subject: F1000 Monthly Update - May 2015
body:
To ensure you receive F1000 emails, add info@updates.f1000.com to your safelist.

-----------------------------------------------------

Faculty of 1000 |  http://f1000.com                
Monthly Update |  May 2015

----------------------------------------------------- 

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    
F1000 launches F1000Workspace
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    

Today we're announcing the launch of F1000Workspace [ http://f1000.com/work ], our new platform for scientists to collect, write & discuss scientific literature. All F1000Prime subscribers have full access to F1000Workspace. You'll also get a credit to publish a free 'short paper' (1,000 words or less) with F1000Research [ http://f1000research.com/ ].

You can find out more [ http://blog.f1000.com/2015/05/06/work-smart-with-workspace-our-new-platform-for-writing-papers/ ] and try it out for yourself here: [ http://f1000.com/work ]. 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------                                                 
"The platform elegantly integrates my web-based research and publication needs, without the bloat and excess of existing reference managers. I am certain the F1000 platform will increase my productivity and make journal reading, annotation, and referencing a seamless and more enjoyable process. I am recommending the platform to all my scientific colleagues."

Richard Cho - Massachusetts Institute of Technology
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------                                                 


   F1000Prime                                
==================

Below is a selection of recommendations added by our Faculty of 10,000+ Members over the past month:


6 *

Scientists, take a run! 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/725431925?key=0dbNfhBe9LejslL ]
For scientists to generate useful, genuinely new insights, they need space for reflection and informal activities so they can re-learn to think intuitively and with reasoning.
Scheffer M, Bascompte J, Bjordam T et al.
Ecology and Society. 2015; 20:3


7 *

Good news on drug allergies 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/725281360?key=kkZKcJBdBZzei12 ]
A team using a mouse model to study mast cell activation identifies a potential therapeutic target to reduce drug-induced adverse reactions.
McNeil BD, Pundir P, Meeker S et al.
Nature. 2015; 519:237-41


6 *

Natural genetic modifications 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/725444707?key=fWJkPeJ3BqkHZKW ]
If you have a weakness for sweet potato fries, you'll have eaten a genetically modified organism and not known it. The sweet potato is a natural transgenic food crop.
Kyndt T, Quispe D, Zhai H et al.
Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A. 2015 [Epub ahead of print]


F1000Prime Reports
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Open-access review journal [ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/ ], reporting on the hottest topics.

Advances in the prevention of Alzheimer's Disease 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/m/7/50 ]
Alzheimer's disease has reached epidemic proportions and no cure is currently available. However, mounting evidence suggests that, by adopting a raft of measures together, it is possible to dramatically reduce one's risk of developing the disease.
F1000Prime Report by Sindi S, Mangialasche F and Kivipelto M [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/499999771097532700 ].
F1000Prime Rep 2015, 7:50. 

 ---------------
 See all recent F1000Prime Reports          
 >> http://f1000.com/prime/reports/                 
 --------------- 


---------------------- 

~~~~~~~~~
Royal Society / National Academies New Fellows and Members 
~~~~~~~~~

Please join us [ http://blog.f1000.com/2015/05/05/royal-societynational-academy-of-science-new-fellows-and-members-2015/ ] in congratulating a large number of F1000 Faculty who have been inducted into the prestigious ranks of the Royal Society and the National Academies of Sciences. Read more on our blog [ http://blog.f1000.com/2015/05/05/royal-societynational-academy-of-science-new-fellows-and-members-2015/ ].
 

~~~~~~~~~
F1000 on tour 
~~~~~~~~~

F1000 is on the road once again. See the list of talks we're giving and conferences we're attending on our blog [ http://blog.f1000research.com/2015/04/29/on-the-road-again-f1000tour/ ]. Please come and say hi!


---------------------- 


   F1000Research                      
======================

Our innovative open science publishing platform [ http://f1000research.com/ ] offering rapid publication, open peer review and open data. 

Below is a selection of our latest peer reviewed articles:

OPINION ARTICLE
The culture of scientific research [ http://f1000research.com/articles/4-66/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/53j ]
Published: 13 Mar 2015
Joynson C, Leyser O [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/1629729245373936 ]
F1000Research 2015, 4:66

REVIEW
I drink for my liver, Doc: emerging evidence that coffee prevents cirrhosis [ http://f1000research.com/articles/4-95/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/59o ]
Published: 21 Apr 2015
Feld JJ, Lavoie EG, Fausther M et al.
F1000Research 2015, 4:95

RESEARCH NOTE
Antiviral therapies against Ebola and other emerging viral diseases using existing medicines that block virus entry [ http://f1000research.com/articles/4-30/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/52g ]
Published: 10 Feb 2015
Long J, Wright E, Molesti E et al.
F1000Research 2015, 4:30

RESEARCH ARTICLE
Weak and contradictory effects of self-medication with nectar nicotine by parasitized bumblebees [ http://f1000research.com/articles/4-73/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/56l ]
Published: 19 Mar 2015
Baracchi D, Brown MJF, Chittka L [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/8351263021504972 ]
F1000Research 2015, 4:73

 ---------------------------------------------
  Submit now to F1000Research          
  >> http://f1000research.com/author/submit        
 ---------------------------------------------- 

~~~~~~~~~ 
ISCB Article Channel
~~~~~~~~~ 

Starting in July, the International Society of Computational Biology (ISCB) will have a dedicated channel on F1000Research for the ISCB Community Journal. This channel will have its own editorial board, and will allow researchers to publish work they presented at ISCB conferences. Find out more on our blog [ http://blog.f1000research.com/2015/04/30/f1000research-to-publish-the-iscb-community-journal/ ].


~~~~~~~~~ 
MSF posters and slides
~~~~~~~~~ 

F1000Research recently sponsored MSF Scientific day [ http://www.msf.org.uk/msf-scientific-day-2015-livestream ], and we are now hosting all the posters and slides for all to see. Check them out here [ http://f1000research.com/msf/sciday-uk15 ].

 
     F1000Posters                 
======================

Open Repository [ http://f1000.com/posters ] for posters and slide presentations; completely free to view and submit. Below is a selection:


NEUROSCIENCE
Studying the neural correlates of smoking with e-cigarettes and fMRI: A feasibility study 
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1097792 ]
Lyons G, Mentink A and Wall M
F1000Posters 2015, 6:267  

ECOLOGY
The Southern California squirrel survey: exploring the spatial ecology and educational role of squirrels in Southern California 
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1097707 ]
Ordenan M, Dines J
F1000Posters 2015, 6:240

NEUROSCIENCE
The genetic code of neurotransmission 
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1097469 ]
Gramatikoff K, Kovacs I
F1000Posters 2015, 6:54


  ----------------------------------------------
  Deposit now        
  >> http://f1000.com/posters/fordepositors      
  ----------------------------------------------


 
----------------------

 * Follow us on Twitter * 
  
@F1000 [ http://twitter.com/f1000 ]  
@F1000Research [ http://twitter.com/f1000research ]     
 
  * 'Like' us on Facebook *

F1000Research [ https://www.facebook.com/F1000Research ]   
 
  * Connect with us on LinkedIn *  
  
Faculty of 1000 [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?mostRecent=&gid=1971657 ]   
F1000Research [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?home=&gid=4267793 ]  
F1000 Specialists [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?mostRecent=&gid=8123808 ]  
  
 * Follow our blogs * 
  
F1000 Blog [ http://blog.f1000.com/ ]
F1000Research Blog [ http://blog.f1000research.com/ ]
 
 
----------------------


-----------------------------------------------------   

You have received this message because you asked to receive the F1000 Monthly Update to your registered email address from Faculty of 1000. If you do not wish to receive any further such messages, you may unsubscribe [ http://www.f1000.com/unsubscribe/email?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&emailAlertType=MONTHLY_UPDATES ] at any time. For further information or enquiries please contact Customer Services at info@f1000.com [ mailto:info@f1000.com ].

Faculty of 1000 Ltd | Science Navigation Group

Middlesex House, 34-42 Cleveland Street | London, W1T 4LB | United Kingdom
